build.// cad-desktop-tauri-and-perf Slice T2: Dev points at Next's localhost server; prod loads the static-export bundle from `../out-desktop/`. The web build is unaffected — STARR_BUILD_TARGET is set by `npm run build:desktop` (Slice T1).

windows.title: Starr CAD
windows.// landing URL: Tauri serves the static export from the bundle root; route into the CAD canvas directly so the standalone binary opens straight into the survey workspace.

bundle.longDescription: Standalone Starr CAD — TRV / STARR / CSV import, full surveying workspace, AI-assisted editing.
bundle.// macOS / Windows / Linux specifics wil: Notarization, code-signing, MSI/DMG/AppImage knobs are added once the CI matrix lands; defaults are fine for local dev builds.
